title: Priyank Kharge directs zilla panchayat CEOs to ensure there is no drinking water shortage in Karnataka villages
description: As Karnataka is facing the peak summer heat, Minister for Rural Development and Panchayat Raj and IT and BT Priyank Kharge on Wednesday directed Chief Executive Officers of all zilla panchayats to take urgent and proactive measures to ensure that no village faces a shortage of drinking water during the summer months
